# passwork_vault_type (Data Source)

Fetches a Passwork vault type by name or code. Use the returned `id` as `type_id` in `passwork_vault` when the server has the `vaultType` feature enabled.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "passwork_vault_type" "default" {
  code = "default"
}

resource "passwork_vault" "example" {
  name    = "My Vault"
  type_id = data.passwork_vault_type.default.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `code` (String) Vault type code. Specify either `name` or `code`.
- `name` (String) Vault type display name. Specify either `name` or `code`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Vault type identifier.
